narrative:
Newton Twp township has 2,229 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.1 percentage points.
